name: Free world
description:
My first ever bot I made for personal use a long time back and decided to update when I got tilted at the fact it will incessantly talk for me... :/

Somewhat revised and fixed the personality/instructions (Used Grok AI to help lol), it IN THEORY (Not confirmed) should stop talking for the player/user unless you are into that and directly tell it to. Hopefully.

(I also got goofy and added my music to ts, you should check it out it if you like Lumi Athena's music (I promise im not a clone))
creator: Mahkavelly
